label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking why the visitor came to John's house. The options are steal something, read the story, have a drink, or visit the writer. Looking at the story, John comes back and finds that someone broke in. The visitor had a drink, smoked some cigarettes, and read his story. The note says the visitor is a thief but didn't steal anything that night. He says if John becomes successful, he'll return. So the main action the visitor did was reading the story and giving suggestions. The other things like drink and smoke were just part of what he did while there, but the main purpose seems to be reading the story and providing feedback. The note specifically mentions that the visitor read the story and gave suggestions. The thief's main intent that night wasn't to steal, as he says he's not going to steal anything that night. So
